_comment: Schema v7 L1-only bundle: payload.core present, payload.enrichment absent, scores reflect 'dimensão ausente' semantic. prompt_quality is null because the scorer is enrichment-exclusive (no sessions captured). growth_rate is null because core history is shorter than 6 months. overall is null because only test_maturity and tech_breadth produced numeric scores and a 2-of-4 partial overall would be misleading (calculate_overall returns null when too many dimensions are absent — see scorers/overall.py renormalization). Used to test that the verifier accepts null score values without rejecting the bundle.
